assertionResults.title: Resets on Lock and on Clear Credentials

assertionResults.title: High-rate ingestion: no drops or reorder within buffer

steps.expected: Injected sequence remains strictly ordered with no duplicates/missing sequence continuity in retained buffer.
steps.observed: runtimeEventLog.test.tsx passed; sequence assertions enforce monotonic contiguous seq values and unique entries under high-volume insertions.
